title: An Act to Enact the Passamaquoddy Fisheries and Workforce Development Act
final_disposition: Automatic Withdrawal Pursuant to Joint Rule 305.6, May 21, 2025
last_house_action: 3/21/2025 - Carried over, in the same posture, to the next special or regular session of the 132nd Legislature, pursuant to Joint Order SP 519.
last_senate_action: 5/21/2025 - Pursuant to Joint Rule 305.6, Placed in Legislative Files ( DEAD ).

actions.description: Committee on JUDICIARY suggested and ordered printed. On motion of Representative KUHN of Falmouth, the Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on MARINE RESOURCES . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on MARINE RESOURCES . In concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
Carried over, in the same posture, to the next special or regular session of the 132nd Legislature, pursuant to Joint Order SP 519.
Pursuant to Joint Rule 305.6, Placed in Legislative Files ( DEAD ).
